title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Puma India Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Puma India Capital India:
Puma India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India Capital India!
